title: bignonia nocturna
intro: Bignonia nocturna, also known as the night-blooming jasmine or queen of the night, is a flowering plant native to tropical regions of Central and South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Bignonia nocturna are said to include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the flowers and leaves of the plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to promote relaxation and overall well-being.
